title: AIYAPLAY Pedal Go Kart, Ride on Racer with Automatic Clutch, Brake, Non-Slip EVA Wheels, Metal Frame, Go Kart for Kids Ages 3-6 Years, Pink
features: Easy to ride: With an automatic clutch and brake, kids can start and stop this pedal go-kart smoothly – no tricky controls, just confident, safe fun.
Forward and reverse gears: This pedal car lets them ride in both directions – no batteries, no charging, just endless adventure.
Stable and comfortable: Made with solid metal and plastic, this kids go-kart holds up to 50kg. The wide seat and tall backrest keep little riders supported and comfy.
Quiet, smooth wheels: The four EVA wheels glide silently over pavements and paths for a steady, non-slip ride.
Dimensions: 60.5H x 100W x 59Dcm. Suitable for heights: 110-135cm. Safety standard: EN71-1-2-3. Assembly required.
description: Product Description Package includes: 1 x Pedal go-kart for kids 1 x Manual Every outing becomes an adventure with the AIYAPLAY kids pedal go-kart! Smooth starts and stops come easy with the automatic clutch and brake, giving kids confident, safe control. With forward and reverse functions, they can ride freely, while the EVA anti-slip wheels offer a quiet, cushioned drive on pavements and brick paths. Wonderful for any day out, it brings energy, fun and a little thrill to every journey. Automatic clutch system for easy, safe use for kids Forward, reverse and brake functions make it easy to control No charging needed, just use the pedals to move the go-kart EVA anti-slip wheels rides smooth on different surfaces Shock-absorbing tyres reduce noise Solid metal frame and plastic can support up to 50kg Assembly required Colour Pink Material Plastic and metal Overall dimensions 60.5H x 100L x 59Wcm Seat 23W x 34.5Dcm Seat height 31.5Hcm Backrest 32H x 34Wcm Wheel Φ24cm Approved age 3+ years Recommended age 3-6 years Recommended height 110-135cm Maximum load 50kg Item label 370-395V00PK
